title: Server crashes when executing a window query with ordering by EXTRACT date
poc: create table employees (dep varchar(10), name varchar(20), salary double, hire_date date);
SELECT dep, name, salary, SUM(salary) OVER (ORDER BY EXTRACT(MONTH FROM hire_date)) salary_sum FROM employees;
SELECT dep, name, salary, SUM(salary) OVER (ORDER BY hire_date) salary_sum FROM employees;
SELECT dep, name, salary, SUM(salary) OVER (PARTITION BY dep ORDER BY EXTRACT(MONTH FROM hire_date)) salary_sum FROM employees;
key_bug_features: Executing window query with ordering by EXTRACT date
bug_features_seed: CREATE TABLE departments (id INT PRIMARY KEY, name VARCHAR(50) NOT NULL);
CREATE TABLE employees (dep_id INT, name VARCHAR(20), salary DOUBLE, hire_date DATE, FOREIGN KEY (dep_id) REFERENCES departments(id));

INSERT INTO employees VALUES (1, 'Smith', 81, STR_TO_DATE('10-08-2019', '%d-%m-%Y')), (2, 'Jones', 55, STR_TO_DATE('9-08-2019', '%d-%m-%Y')), (3, 'Williams', 55, STR_TO_DATE('14-07-2019', '%d-%m-%Y'));
SELECT dep_id, name, salary, SUM(salary) OVER (ORDER BY EXTRACT(YEAR FROM hire_date)) AS salary_sum FROM employees;
